sprint_goal:
Plan and start Sprint 2: Core Tickets CRUD, Conversation Threads, and Seeded Demo Data.

Break this sprint down into issues for:
1. Ticket Model & Migration: Create Ticket model with organization_id, subject, description, status (open, pending, resolved, closed), priority (low, medium, high, urgent), requester_id (user), assignee_id (user), and tags. Ensure organization_id is automatically scoped.
2. Comment Model & Migration: Create Comment model for threaded replies on tickets. Must include ticket_id, user_id, body, and is_internal (boolean for agent-only notes).
3. Tickets API Controller: Implement CRUD routes. Index must be filterable by status, priority, and assignee_id, with basic text search on subject/description. Ensure cross-tenant data leak checks are strictly enforced.
4. Comments API Controller: Implement endpoints to view ticket replies and post a reply (public) or internal note (is_internal = true, restricted to admins/agents).
5. Database Seeder: Create a DatabaseSeeder that populates 1 organization, 1 Admin, 2 Agents, 2 Customers, and exactly 12 tickets with a mix of statuses, priorities, assignees, and threaded replies (some public, some internal).
6. Integration Tests: Write Pest/PHPUnit feature tests verifying ticket CRUD, comment postings, and testing that Customer roles cannot see internal notes.

tasks.title: Ticket & Comment Models with Migrations
tasks.description: Create Ticket model (organization_id auto-scoped, subject, description, status enum, priority enum, requester_id, assignee_id, tags) and Comment model (ticket_id, user_id, body, is_internal). Include relationships, fillable arrays, casts, and global organization scope on Ticket.

tasks.title: Tickets API Controller with Filtering & Search
tasks.description: Implement CRUD endpoints for tickets. Index must support filtering by status, priority, and assignee_id, plus text search on subject/description. Enforce strict organization scoping to prevent cross-tenant data leaks. Include Form Requests for validation.

tasks.title: Comments API Controller with Role-Based Visibility
tasks.description: Implement endpoints to list ticket comments and post replies. Public replies open to all; internal notes (is_internal=true) restricted to admins/agents only. Customers must be excluded from viewing internal notes via query scope and response filtering.

tasks.title: Database Seeder with Demo Data
tasks.description: Create DatabaseSeeder seeding 1 organization, 1 Admin, 2 Agents, 2 Customers, and exactly 12 tickets with mixed statuses/priorities/assignees plus threaded replies (some public, some internal). Use factories where appropriate.

tasks.title: Integration Tests for Tickets, Comments & Permissions
tasks.description: Write Pest feature tests covering ticket CRUD, comment posting (public + internal), customer inability to view internal notes, and cross-tenant access prevention. Verify filtering and search behavior on ticket index.
